name: Gender-ideology index
explanation: Mean of valid items, mapped to [0,1]; 1 = most traditional

name: Female (0/1)
explanation: 1 if respondent is female, 0 if male

name: Urban hukou (0/1)
explanation: Hukou: 农业=rural, 非农业 or 居民=urban; see method

name: Education (years, current)
explanation: Highest completed level mapped to years (continuous)

name: Currently employed (0/1)
explanation: Survey-specific employment indicator; see method note

name: Occupation ISEI (current)
explanation: Current-job ISEI; only CFPS 2020 has it directly

name: Personal income (RMB)
explanation: Annual personal income (urban monthly for ACWF 1990)
